zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Wardale於1490年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維爾時，他的父親Hugh Wardwell60歲，母親Isabelle Wardwell15歲。他於1530年與Anna Eden在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1585年11月26日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿福德享年95歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾阿福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Wardale于1490年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾維爾时，他的父亲Hugh Wardwell60岁，母亲Isabelle Wardwell15岁。他于1530年与Anna Eden在英国英格兰林可爾史爾阿福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1585年11月26日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾阿福德享年95岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: Wardale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Wardle
meanings: habitational name from Wardle in Lancashire and possibly Wardle in Cheshire, both named with Old English weard-hyll ‘watch hill’. Compare Warden 2 and Wardlaw .
habitational name from Weardale (Durham), which takes its name from the river Wear (related to the Indo-European root wis-, weis- ‘liquid, flow’ or wedōr- ‘water’) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Wardale was born in 1490, in Well, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Wardwell, was 60 and his mother, Isabelle Wardwell, was 15. He married Anna Eden in 1530, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 26 November 1585, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 95, and was buried in Alford, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Wardale est né en 1490, à Well, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Wardwell, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Wardwell, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Anna Eden en 1530, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 26 novembre 1585, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterré à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Wardale 1490 in Well, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Wardwell 60 und seine Mutter Isabelle Wardwell 15. Er hat 1530 in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Anna Eden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 26. November 1585 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Alford, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Wardale è nato il nel 1490 nel Well, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh Wardwell, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle Wardwell, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Anna Eden nel 1530, nel Alford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 novembre 1585, nel Alford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolto a Alford, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Wardaleが1490年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウエルで生まれた時，父Hugh Wardwellは60歳，母Isabelle Wardwellは15歳であった。1530年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードでAnna Edenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1585年11月26日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードで95歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Wardale(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Wardwell(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle Wardwell(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 알퍼드에서 Anna Eden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1585년 11월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 알퍼드에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 알퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Wardale родился в 1490 г. в местности велл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh Wardwell было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Wardwell, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Eden в 1530 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 26 ноября 1585 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет и был похоронен в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Wardale nació en 1490, en Well, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Wardwell, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Isabelle Wardwell, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Anna Eden en 1530, en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de noviembre de 1585, en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultado en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
